mapper.select: SELECT w.*, p.product_name, COALESCE(SUM(r.good_qty), 0) AS actual_qty, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r.good_qty), 0) / w.target_qty * 100, 1) AS progressRate FROM work_order w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_result r ON w.order_id = r.order_id GROUP BY w.order_id ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
SELECT w.*, p.product_name FROM work_order w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order (product_id, target_qty, status, order_date) VALUES (#{productId}, #{targetQty}, '대기', #{orderDate})
